items.title: PSV gaat als 22e de laatste wedstrijd van de competitiefase van de CL in
items.summary: PSV stuitte woensdag op Newcastle United in speelronde zeven van de competitiefase van de Champions League. In deze VI Live miste je niets van dat belangrijke duel, dat eindigde in mineur.

items.title: Engelsen schrikken van PSV: 'Gedoemd om in de problemen te komen'
items.summary: De afgang van PSV in Newcastle maakt ook in Engeland de tongen los. Op het Britse eiland zijn ze enigszins geschrokken van de Eindhovenaren, die eerder dit seizoen nog zo'n goede indruk achterlieten.

items.title: PSV in cijfers: foutenfestival en minste schoten onder Bosz
items.summary: Het Champions League-duel met Newcastle United is woensdagavond voor PSV uitgedraaid op een deceptie. De Eindhovenaren kwamen snel op achterstand, hadden geen moment zicht op een resultaat en verloren uiteindelijk met ruime cijfers: 3-0. Dit zijn de belangrijkste statistieken uit de wedstrijd, waarin PSV nauwelijks gevaar wist te stichten en vooral zichzelf in de problemen bracht.

items.title: Liverpool beat Marseille to close in on UCL last 16
items.summary: Dominik Szoboszlai helped Liverpool to a 3-0 victory in Marseille that made a Champions League top-eight finish all the more likely.

items.title: Fermin sparks Barça rally as Yamal serves ban
items.summary: Barcelona overcame a scare to boost their hopes of automatic qualification for the Champions League last 16 with a hard-fought 4-2 win at Slavia Prague.

items.title: Kane scores 2, misses pen as Bayern make last 16
items.summary: Harry Kane scored twice as 10-man Bayern Munich sealed their place in the Champions League round of 16 with a 2-0 win against Union Saint-Gilloise.

items.title: Man City players to refund fans after Bodø loss
items.summary: Manchester City's captains have announced they will refund the cost of tickets for nearly 400 supporters.

items.title: Zenden en Janssen discussiëren over kaart Guimarães: 'Voor mij was het rood'
items.summary: Boudewijn Zenden snapte niet dat Newcastle United de wedstrijd met elf man uitspeelde. Aanvoerder Bruno Guimarães plantte in de eerste helft zijn noppen op de enkel van Joey Veerman. Hij kwam weg met een gele kaart en dat zorgde voor ongeloof bij de analyticus van Ziggo Sport. Theo Janssen vond het geen rood.

items.title: Bosz wil niets weten van 'afgetroefd' PSV: 'Nee, dat vind ik totaal niet'
items.summary: Peter Bosz wil er niets van weten dat PSV afgetroefd zou zijn door Newcastle United in de Champions League. Woensdagavond verloren de Eindhovenaren in Engeland met ruime cijfers en bovendien creëerden ze zelf nauwelijks kansen.

items.title: Papers: Palmer keen on potential Man Utd transfer
items.summary: The top stories and transfer rumours from Thursday's newspapers...

items.title: Salah returns as Liverpool score three to beat Marseille
items.summary: Mohammad Salah returns to the Liverpool starting XI as Liverpool score three goals, including an intelligent Dominik Szoboszlai free kick, to beat Olympique Marseille.

items.title: Chelsea keep top-eight hopes alive with win over Pafos
items.summary: Moises Caicedo's 77th-minute goal keeps Chelsea's hopes of finishing in the Champions League top eight alive after victory of Pafos at Stamford Bridge.

items.title: Newcastle secure last-16 play-off spot after comfortable win over PSV
items.summary: Newcastle United clinch a Champions League last 16 play-off spot following a comfortable 3-0 win over PSV Eindhoven at St James's Park.

items.title: Champions League as it happened: Liverpool cruise to win over Marseille
items.summary: Enjoy Wednesday's UEFA Champions League action with matches such as Marseille against Liverpool, Juventus against Benfica and Slavia Prague against Barcelona.

items.title: Szoboszlai’s low blow puts Liverpool on a high as Salah returns in Marseille
items.summary: Liverpool and Arne Slot continue to find their release on European soil. What had been billed as an intimidating, intense examination of the faltering Premier League champions by Roberto De Zerbi’s Marseille proved nothing of the sort as Slot’s side moved confidently towards automatic qualification for the last 16 of the Champions League. Dominik Szoboszlai, an own goal forced by Jeremie Frimpong and the substitute Cody Gakpo brought Liverpool a merited victory in the south of France plus a ninth win in 11 European away fixtures under Slot. The margin of victory could have been even greater but, having struggled to turn possession into chances and chances into wins of late, the Liverpool head coach will take satisfaction from a comprehensive triumph all the same. Continue reading...

items.title: Liverpool close on CL knockouts with big win over Marseille
items.summary: Liverpool moved up to fourth in the Champions League table with an impressive 3-0 win over Marseille at the Stade Velodrome.

items.title: Barnes seals easy win against PSV but Newcastle face wait over Guimarães
items.summary: There are many ways to self-destruct on a football pitch but PSV Eindhoven chose one of the more obvious methods. In opting to play out slowly from the back against high-pressing opponents possessing forwards blessed with the speed and skill of Yoane Wissa and Anthony Gordon, Peter Bosz’s team were always likely to come undone. Continue reading...

items.title: Moisés Caicedo saves face for wasteful Chelsea against battling Pafos
items.summary: The brief ripple of applause at full time said it all. This was a deeply unconvincing display from ­Chelsea, who took 78 agonising minutes to find a way past the might of the champions of Cyprus, and it was not a surprise that Stamford Bridge greeted victory with such a muted response. The mood was one of relief. There was plenty of angst on a night when the home fans continued their protests against Chelsea’s ­owners. The football was too slow, too ­predictable, and it hardly seemed to register that Moisés Caicedo shattering Pafos FC’s defiance ensured that Liam ­Rosenior’s side will have a chance to secure direct qualification into the ­Champions League last 16 when they visit Napoli in their final game next week. Continue reading...

items.title: Kaptein sinks Manchester City to send Chelsea into Women’s League Cup final
items.summary: Manchester City 0-1 Chelsea (Kaptein 41) Chelsea will meet Manchester United in the final Chelsea reached a seventh successive Women’s League Cup final as they edged past their rivals ­Manchester City to book a meeting with Manchester United – but even the Chelsea head coach, Sonia Bompastor, had to admit her team were a “little bit lucky” as City did everything but equalise. Wieke Kaptein’s first-half header won the contest for the holders, but Hannah Hampton’s ­acrobatics in goal and a series of spurned opportunities from City were the key difference, leaving home fans baffled as to how they had not reached the final, which will be played at Ashton Gate on 15 March. Continue reading...

items.title: CL hits and misses: Move over Salah - Szoboszlai is Liverpool's superstar now
